title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird, founder of Koah Labs, argues that ad-based monetization is superior to subscriptions for AI tools and that human trust, not technology capability, is the primary bottleneck for AI agent adoption. He applies decision frameworks from competitive sailing, emphasizing probability-based thinking and expected value in startup building.
